## Checklist

- [ ] Shipped files changed (`skills/`, `agents/`, `references/`, `.claude-plugin/`) → `CHANGELOG.md` gains an entry under `## [Unreleased]` in this PR
- [ ] `references/` touched → both `skills/*/SKILL.md` re-read against the change; no summary contradicts a reference
- [ ] `bash tests/run-checks.sh` passes locally
